steps.title: Track the passage sequence
steps.content: The text begins with specific Ojibwe words, then explains the general phenomenon of reduplication, then says this type of reduplication appears often in Ojibwe.

steps.title: Reject invented structures
steps.content: Choice A invents a language comparison and question-answer pattern. Choice B invents translation issues. Choice D invents scholarly controversy and an argument for resolving it. The answer is C.
